hero.subtitle: Elevate your music with us. Professional recording, mixing, mastering and sound design

services.sectionDesc: Professional audio solutions tailored to every project, from recording to final mastering

antiMalentendu.includedDesc: balance, dynamics, space, overall coherence, final master.
antiMalentendu.notIncludedDesc: Versioning, multistems, advanced editing, track cleanup/repair.

cta.desc: Contact us to discuss your project and get a personalized quote.

mixage-mastering.title: Mixing + Mastering
mixage-mastering.description: Premium hybrid analog/digital service for a high-end professional result
mixage-mastering.details: Our flagship service combines professional mixing and high-quality mastering. We use a hybrid approach combining the best of analog and digital to elevate your productions.
mixage-mastering.process: Analysis → Mixing → Mastering → Revisions → Final delivery

mixage-mastering-express.title: Mixing + Mastering | Essential
mixage-mastering-express.description: Professional full-digital solution for artists working on .wav instrumentals
mixage-mastering-express.details: Our essential service is primarily aimed at artists working on instrumentals. Get the luxury of professional all-digital mixing and mastering at a reduced cost.
mixage-mastering-express.process: Analysis → Mixing → Mastering → Revisions → Final delivery

stem-mastering.title: Stem Mastering
stem-mastering.description: Hybrid analog/digital mastering from your stems (1 production stem + 1 vocal stem, already mixed)
stem-mastering.details: Ideal stem mastering service if you've already mixed your tracks. Send us a production stem and a vocal stem, and we'll handle the mastering with our hybrid analog/digital chain.
stem-mastering.process: Receive stems → Hybrid mastering → Revisions → Final delivery
included: For: 1 production stem + 1 vocal stem (already mixed)

mixage-hybride.title: Hybrid Mixing
mixage-hybride.description: Professional hybrid analog/digital mixing without mastering
mixage-hybride.details: Mixing-only service, without mastering. Ideal if you already have a mastering engineer or want professional-quality hybrid mixing.

captation-sonore.title: Sound Recording
captation-sonore.description: Professional audio recording in studio, or for events and shoots
captation-sonore.details: Complete recording service in studio or on location. Minimum 3-hour block (€120). We adapt to all your needs with professional-quality equipment.

direction-artistique.title: Artistic Direction / Arrangement
direction-artistique.description: Custom artistic guidance and musical arrangements
direction-artistique.details: Complete support for your artistic project, from concept to execution, with technical and creative expertise.
direction-artistique.process: Artistic analysis → Strategic advice → Arrangements → Follow-up → Optimization

composition.title: Composition / Beatmaking
composition.description: Music creation and custom beat production
composition.details: From idea to full realization, we create original compositions tailored to your style and artistic needs.
composition.process: Artistic brief → Creation → Arrangements → Production → Finalization

sound-design.title: Sound Design
sound-design.description: Sound creation and audio design for all your creative projects
sound-design.details: Specialized in creating unique sonic worlds, we bring your audiovisual projects to life with original sounds and immersive atmospheres.
sound-design.process: Creative brief → Sound research → Creation → Synchronization → Global mix → Finalization
included: Sound design for film and games

formation.title: Music Production / Mixing Training
formation.description: Personalized training in music production and mixing techniques
formation.details: Comprehensive training in modern music production techniques. Learn the secrets of composition and mixing through mastering with an experienced professional.
formation.process: Level assessment → Custom program → Hands-on training → Progress tracking

pack-single.title: "Single" Pack
pack-single.description: The complete package: beat + recording + hybrid mixing + mastering
pack-single.process: Composition → Recording → Editing → Production → Mixing → Mastering → Delivery
pack-single.details: The complete Single pack: from production to final delivery. Includes beat composition, a 3h recording session, editing, production, hybrid mixing and mastering. Everything you need to release a professional single.
